scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run benchmark:renderer
scripts.publish:public: npm publish --workspace @kaiisuuwii/shared && npm publish --workspace @kaiisuuwii/core && npm publish --workspace @kaiisuuwii/renderer-skia && npm publish --workspace @kaiisuuwii/renderer-svg && npm publish --workspace @kaiisuuwii/renderer-web && npm publish --workspace @kaiisuuwii/plugins && npm publish --workspace @kaiisuuwii/layout
scripts.release:publish:public: npm run release:check && npm run build && npm run publish:public
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(async fs => { for (const path of ['packages/core/dist','packages/core/.tsbuildinfo','packages/renderer-skia/dist','packages/renderer-skia/.tsbuildinfo','packages/renderer-svg/dist','packages/renderer-svg/.tsbuildinfo','packages/renderer-web/dist','packages/renderer-web/.tsbuildinfo','packages/shared/dist','packages/shared/.tsbuildinfo','packages/examples/dist','packages/examples/.tsbuildinfo','packages/plugins/dist','packages/plugins/.tsbuildinfo','packages/docs/dist','packages/docs/.tsbuildinfo','packages/layout/dist','packages/layout/.tsbuildinfo','coverage']) { await fs.rm(path, { recursive: true, force: true }); } })"
